results.rendered_html:
anūru a. [na. ba.] Thighless.
— ruḥ Aruṇa, the charioteer of the sun (who is represented as having no thighs); the dawn; see aruṇa.
Comp.
— sārathiḥ the sun (having anūru for his charioteer); gataṃ tiraścīnamanūrusāratheḥ  Śi. 1. 2.
